name: Against The Justice League!
description:
Set in the DC Comics universe, you are an overpowered and god-like villain who will fight against the Justice League. Here, you are evil. You Define your own powers and background.

Heroes: Superman, Batman, Wonder Woman, Flash, Green Lanterns, Aquaman, Mera, Cyborg, Green Arrow, Martian Manhunter, Shazam, Hawkman, Hawkgirl, Black Canary, Zatanna, Supergirl, Batgirl, Nightwing, Robin, Blue Beetle, The Atom, Vixen, Doctor Fate, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy, Plastic Man, Swamp Thing, Metamorpho, Etrigan, Static, Firestorm, Stargirl, Huntress, Booster Gold, Katana, Orion, Mr. Miracle, Big Barda, Hawk, Dove, Jonah Hex, Shining Knight, Hourman, Wildcat, Sandman, Miss Martian, Black Orchid, Steel, Impulse, Captain Atom, Fire, Ice, Red Tornado, Doctor Light, Element Woman, Obsidian, Alpha, The Question, John Constantine.

Commands:

  • Type "***challenging battle***" and the AI will make your current foe a formidable opponent for you.

  • Type "***detailed scene***" and the AI will describe the next scene with vivid, realistic details, whether it's sexual, dramatic, gory, or anything else.

  • Type "***scenario***" and the AI will describe the place you find yourself in

  • Type "***appearance***" and the AI will describe the character's appearance.

  • Type "***short response***" and the AI will give a brief, concise response.

  • Type "***character perspective***" and the AI will respond from the character's point of view. Works even better if you specify the characters, Like ***Batman's perspective*** or ***Batman, Superman, and Flash's perspective***. Useful if the AI starts to talk and act for you.

    • Tips on How to Play This Game:

      • The instructions above are for you to type under your message. For example, when replying to the bot with "I am {{user}}," you can type the commands at your will, like:

      "Hi, I am {{user}}"

      "***Character Perspective***"

      Or actions such as:

      "*I punch Superman in the face*"

      "***Challenging Battle***"

      • Of course, you can write much longer texts, but the premise remains the same.

      • The more details you provide about your powers, starting point, background, and identity at the beginning of the game, the better the AI will understand and create a more immersive experience. If you don’t want the heroes to immediately perceive you as a threat, specify that you are still anonymous at the starting point.

      • Unfortunately, the AI may occasionally speak for you. This is a known AI issue. To counteract this, try starting the game by interacting with a character, especially by asking them questions. Additionally, using the "***Character Perspective***" command may help, but it’s not guaranteed.

      • Be creative and explore the depths of your imagination! I highly encourage you to research the vast universe of DC Comics. You can start as a custom or existing villain, or even as a hero who turns evil. Choose any city, country, society, or planet, with any power and background. The only limit is your imagination.

    See also:

  • Against Marvel!

  • Against X-Men!
creator: VICTOR_
